list.title: ConLog
list.description: This is the core logging function.

list.title: ConLogHookPost
list.description: Function to post logs to a webhook.

list.title: ConLogInit
list.description: Initialize ConLog with global enable/disable setting.

list.title: ConLogSet
list.description: Configure which log types are displayed.All parameters default to true, so you only need to specify false values.

list.title: ConLogStartMsg
list.description: Display startup message showing current ConLog settings.Useful for debugging or confirming ConLog is properly initialized.

list.title: ConLogWebhook
list.description: Initialize ConLogWebhook to send logs to a webhook.

list.title: webhookDiscord
list.description: Function that sends to discord webhook.
